message:
fix: fromJSON uses all row keys, pg-wire unknown messages no longer fake terminate

convenience.ts: createFromJSON() used Object.keys(data[0]) for column
detection — rows with extra keys had those columns silently dropped.
Now unions keys across all rows.

pg-wire: unknown frontend messages (extended query protocol Parse/Bind/
Execute/Sync) were returned as { type: "terminate" }, conflating them
with real client disconnect. Now returns { type: "skip" } which the
handler explicitly ignores without affecting connection lifecycle.
